docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEHRMEYER, KAITLYN AS TO DEFENDANT DOORSTEAD INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEHRMEYER, KAITLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOORSTEAD INC. $4,644.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,744.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-22-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KAITLYN KEHMEYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOORSTEAD INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: A. OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF, KAITLYN KEHRMEYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, DOORSTEAD, INC. IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY DARIN DEFREECE. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH PARTIES RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,644.00 FILED BY KEHRMEYER, KAITLYN AS TO DEFENDANT DOORSTEAD INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED MAR-04-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOORSTEAD INC.
